description_long: This object is a mature coconut with a roughly spherical shape and a slightly flattened appearance. Its outer surface is covered in a dense, fibrous husk with a brown coloration, featuring subtle variations in tone and a natural, irregular pattern of fine fibers. The texture appears matte and somewhat rough, with no visible stem or attachment point present on any side. There are no prominent markings, scars, or openings, and the coloration is consistent across all views, ranging from light to medium brown. The coconut is depicted in isolation, with no contextual background elements to indicate its environment.
description: A round, brown coconut with a fibrous, matte-textured husk and no visible stem or markings. The surface is rough and natural, with subtle color variations.
description_view_0: This view shows a mostly uniform brown surface with fine, dense fiber patterns and no visible stem or scars.
description_view_1: This side reveals a faint seam or line running vertically, with the same fibrous texture and no distinct features.
description_view_2: The surface here is slightly lighter in tone, with the same dense, irregular fiber pattern and no visible attachments.
description_view_3: This view displays a consistent brown coloration and fiber density, with no stem or notable markings present.
attribute_husk_pattern: The husk displays a dense, irregular network of fine fibers running in various directions, creating a natural, matte, and slightly rough surface. The fiber density is consistent, with subtle variations in color and no prominent ridges or deep grooves. The pattern is organic, with no clear symmetry or repeating features.
